base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tile_dungeon_door_shutter — a tile from 1986 legend of zelda. Shutter doors — locked until all enemies in room defeated. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Shutter doors — locked until all enemies in room defeated
